queueConfig.title: Queue Notifications
queueConfig.subtitle: Configure messages sent automatically during queue attendance
queueConfig.enabledHint: When enabled, the customer receives a message with their position upon joining the queue

queueConfig.throttleHint: Prevents repeated notifications in a short time interval

queueConfig.defaultExpireMessage: Hello, unfortunately we were unable to assist at this time. Please contact us again when you can.
